author: Vinayak Gautham
summary: Added R-0006 (Income Classification Authority): the canonical lookup table mapping evidence sources, TDS sections, and AIS categories to the five heads of income under Section 14. This is a foundational Wave 1 rule — all income classification in subsequent rules references this mapping. Added four tests (T-0007 through T-0010) covering Form 16 → Head 1, 194J → Head 3 with confirmation, AIS FD interest → Head 5, and unknown source → escalation. Added JAB M-00 (Decision Coverage) as the north-star KPI. Updated GOVERNANCE.md with Wave 1-4 rule authoring priority structure. Extended rule-schema.json to support optional lookup_table in logic for mapping-type rules.
notes: Phase 5 (Knowledge Expansion) begins here. R-0006 is the first Wave 1 rule. Every income classification rule that follows references this mapping as the canonical authority.
